hypotheses.description: Add ActInfOntologyAnnotation section for variable semantic labeling
hypotheses.rationale: Ontology annotations enable automatic cross-framework compatibility checks and improve model documentation.

hypotheses.description: Consider whether full joint inference is necessary for all state factors
hypotheses.rationale: Moderate dimensionality detected (max 405 elements). Factored inference may be more efficient.

hypotheses.description: Investigate potential missing causal links between model components
hypotheses.rationale: Graph density is 0.12 (11 connections, 10 variables). Sparse graphs may miss important dependencies.

hypotheses.description: Add precision parameters to modulate sensory and policy uncertainty
hypotheses.rationale: The model lacks precision parameters. Active Inference with precision weighting better captures attentional modulation and epistemic confidence.

hypotheses.description: Add Dirichlet concentration parameters for online model learning
hypotheses.rationale: Static A and B matrices cannot adapt. Adding concentration parameters (a, b) enables Bayesian learning from experience.

hypotheses.description: Add ActInfOntologyAnnotation section for variable semantic labeling
hypotheses.rationale: Ontology annotations enable automatic cross-framework compatibility checks and improve model documentation.
